case_title: PASINI, GIANNI et al vs. GARCIA, MIGUEL ANGEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASINI, GIANNI PASINI, VIRGINIA AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MIGUEL ANGEL VALASQUEZ, CAROLINE VALASQUEZ, BENJAMIN DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, MIGUEL ANGEL VALASQUEZ, CAROLINE VALASQUEZ, BENJAMIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3930 MISSION ST, APT. 2 $2,000.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,430.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. W/PAY $1000.00 ON 9/5/94; $250.00 ON 9/15/94; $725.00 ON 10/5/94; AND THE SUM OF $250.00 ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH, UNTIL PAID IN FULL. WHEN PAID IN FULL THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED; PLTF. MAY PROCEED BY EX PARTE IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE TIMELY; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).

U.D. CASE JUDGE WILLIS HANNAWALT, RPT. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. BERNERD F. LIBANTI DEFTS. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTL. CONF. ALL PRESENT. DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MIGUEL ANGEL GARCIA. PLTF. TO HAVE RESTITUTION ON PREMISSES 3930 MISSION ST, APT. 2, SFCA 94112. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. EVICTION STAYED INDEFINITLY. RENT $2,900.00. COSTS $80.00. ATTY. FEES $350.00. PAY $1,000.00 ON 9-5-94. PAY $250.00 ON 9-15-94. ON 10-5-94 PAY $725.00. AND PAY $250.00 ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. WHEN PAID IN FULL CASE TO BE DISMISSED. PLTF. MAY PROCEED ON EXPARTE WRIT IF PAYMENTS NOT MADE TIMELY. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMNT.
